title: DN17 3EF, Keadby Generation Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/YP3133LL/V013
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Keadby Generation Limited Installation name: Keadby Power Station Permit number: EPR/YP3133LL  "
